title: Hubbard model ground-state energy estimate
body: Using variational Monte Carlo on a 8x8 lattice with U/t=4, we obtain a ground-state energy of E_0 = -0.87t per site. The result agrees with the QMC benchmark within 2%.

title: Pulay mixing significantly accelerates SCF convergence for BH3 molecule
body: Switching from simple linear mixing (alpha=0.3) to Pulay mixing with history=8 reduced the SCF cycle count from 47 to 12 for the BH3 molecule in QSGW calculation.

title: Iteration iter-003: SCF convergence confirmed
body: The third iteration confirmed SCF convergence with residual < 1e-8. Band gap converged to 6.2 eV, consistent with the experimental value of 6.0 eV.

title: Result: success — QSGW band gap for BH3
body:
The quasiparticle band gap was computed as:

$$E_g^{\mathrm{QSGW}} = \langle\psi_c|\Sigma(\epsilon_c) - v_{xc}|\psi_cangle - \langle\psi_v|\Sigma(\epsilon_v) - v_{xc}|\psi_vangle$$

Result: $E_g = 6.2$ eV, compared to experimental $E_g^{\mathrm{exp}} = 6.0$ eV. The relative error is 3.3%, within the acceptable threshold of 5%.
